## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new user-facing feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — internal change, no behavior diff
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] docs — docs only
- [ ] test — test-only change
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, build
- [ ] BREAKING — breaks consumer-facing behavior
